developer_response.body:
Thanks for the review.
Glad you noticed the updates — I’m continuing to add more gameplay and improvements. 
Feel free to check back later, there’ll be a lot more to try 😄

reviews.review_description: The Game is really nice you can do so much stuff, and i Played it like 2 hours and i think its better then i am cat🤩

developer_response.body:
Thank you so much for the review and for spending time in the game!
I'm really happy you're enjoying all the interactions.
The game is still early access and I'm actively adding more content and improvements.

reviews.review_description: The panda themed game is pretty cute! Love the snappy and intuitive interaction a lot

developer_response.body:
Thank you so much! I'm really glad you're enjoying the panda theme and interactions.
I'm continuing to add more gameplay and improvements in future updates.

reviews.review_description: you are in a cage with nothing to do and the key is just out of your reach its like the game is teasing you and the grathics is horendissly bad.

developer_response.body:
Hi Daniel, thank you again for sharing your thoughts — I really appreciate it.
Since your review, I’ve added a separate tutorial level so new players can understand the core interaction mechanics before entering the cage scene. Players should have a clearer idea of how to interact with objects around them — which is the key to progressing.
I hope the updated version feels smoother, and if you try it again, I’d love to hear whether the new tutorial helped your first steps. Thanks again for helping make the game better. 🐼💚
